tcp_server_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual tcp_server_config_t(3)

NAME

tcp_server_config_t - TCP server configuration.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h>

Data Fields


int port
TCP listen port. const char * ipv4_address
IPv4 bind address (NULL or empty = don't bind). const char * ipv6_address
IPv6 bind address (NULL or empty = don't bind). bool bind_ipv4
Whether to bind IPv4 socket. bool bind_ipv6
Whether to bind IPv6 socket. double accept_timeout_sec
select() timeout in seconds (supports decimals, e.g. 0.05 for 50ms) tcp_client_handler_fn client_handler
Client handler callback. void * user_data
User data passed to each client handler. tcp_status_update_fn status_update_fn
Optional status update callback (called on timeout, NULL to disable). void * status_update_data
User data passed to status update callback.

Detailed Description

TCP server configuration.

Configures server binding, timeouts, and client handler.

Definition at line 138 of file include/ascii-chat/network/tcp/server.h.
